title: lithocardium niveum
intro: Lithocardium niveum is a type of flowering plant, also known as the white leadwort or galeobdolon, belonging to the family Gentianaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Lithocardium niveum include its potential to alleviate hypertension, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Lithocardium niveum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal purposes.
